headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on PNC Financial Services Gr, Raises Price Target to $278
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Betsy Graseck   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $267 to $278.

headline: The PNC Financial Services Group Provides Quarterly 2027 Earnings Release Dates
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) announced today it expects to issue 2027 quarterly earnings releases pre-market open and hold conference calls at 10 a.m. (ET) on the following dates:
